2025-12-24_14-16-39_session_archive.description: **Chat Focus:** User reported broken documentation links in K3S_QUICK_REFERENCE.tt using incorrect format (`/Documentation/system/FILENAME.tt`). Zencoder analyzed the documentation system architecture, discovered flat namespace routing convention, fixed three broken links, and created comprehensive authoritative DOCUMENTATION_LINK_STANDARDS.md file. Updated documentation template with link formatting guidance for all future documentation agents.
